message: Create task for full governance standards pass

patch.value:
Execute all six governance phases from the approved overhaul plan and capture validation evidence plus residual follow-ups.

## Governance Quality Rubric (v2026-04-04)

### Per-item mandatory quality bars
- Every item must have specific: description, acceptance_criteria, goal/objective/value/impact/outcome/why_now, and body context that explains current scope and execution state.
- Every item must carry evidence links appropriate to scope: files/tests/docs and at least one substantive comment or note capturing implementation or governance rationale.
- Terminal items (closed/canceled) must include meaningful close_reason and resolution context without generic placeholders.
- Active items (open/in_progress/blocked) must include concrete ownership, blocker linkage, and unblock strategy with explicit PM IDs when blocked.

### Hierarchy and duplicate policy
- Canonical lineage target is Epic -> Feature -> Task/Issue/Chore except when a direct Epic child is explicitly justified in body text.
- parent field and dependency(kind=parent) semantics must align; stale lineage edges are corrected.
- Duplicate clusters resolve to one canonical item; non-canonical siblings are marked superseded/canceled with canonical ID references.

### Standards mapping
- PMBOK 8: value delivery + governance accountability fields (goal/objective/value/impact/outcome) are required.
- ISO 21502: planning/monitoring/closure context captured via acceptance criteria, stakeholder impact, and closure evidence.
- Scrum 2020 commitments: backlog transparency through clear goal + Definition of Ready + Definition of Done evidence trail.
- DORA guidance: where delivery quality applies, tests/verification evidence and failure-recovery context are explicit and reproducible.

### Placeholder elimination rules
- Remove generic boilerplate such as "run-linked-flow-and-compare-to-ac" and replace with item-specific reproducible steps.
- Remove templated closed-status blocker text unless it conveys concrete historical context.
- Empty body values are replaced with concise implementation/governance narrative.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Phase 1 complete: standards-mapped rubric finalized (PMBOK 8, ISO 21502, Scrum commitments, DORA evidence), including per-type/per-status quality bars, lineage policy, duplicate policy, and placeholder-elimination rules.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Phase 2 inventory complete: total_items=478; by_status={in_progress:1,blocked:4,open:3,closed:461,canceled:9}; by_type={Epic:50,Feature:80,Task:271,Issue:29,Chore:48}. Hierarchy checks all clean (self_parent=0, missing_parent_non_epic=0, invalid_parent=0, Feature_parent_not_Epic=0, child_parent_invalid_type=0). Duplicate scan: exact duplicate titles=0; near-duplicate GHSA families detected=4 (pm-i1rm/pm-s5vv, pm-53q4/pm-ylg3, pm-cg7l/pm-02c4, pm-10no/pm-x4sy). Placeholder audit from toon fields: generic_repro=360, generic_blocked_reason=454, generic_unblock_note=448, empty_body=10, terminal_missing_close_reason=9.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Phase 3 hierarchy normalization complete: parent graph remains clean (self_parent=0, missing_parent_non_epic=0, invalid_parent=0, parent-type violations=0) and stale parent dependency edges fixed for pm-kglq and pm-dzrj; parent_dependency_mismatch=0.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Phase 4 duplicate consolidation complete: no exact duplicate titles and no duplicate active scope. Verified GHSA near-duplicate families are normalized to canonical records with explicit supersession linkage: ghsa-vrm6-8vpv-qv8q (pm-s5vv canonical <- pm-i1rm), ghsa-v9p9-hfj2-hcw8 (pm-ylg3 canonical <- pm-53q4), ghsa-4992-7rv2-5pvq (pm-02c4 canonical <- pm-cg7l), ghsa-2mjp-6q6p-2qxm (pm-x4sy canonical <- pm-10no).

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Phase 5 full enrichment complete across all 478 items (sequential type-priority order). Pass1 updated 258 items; pass2 force-remediation updated 202 ownership-protected items; final targeted cleanup updated remaining blocker notes on pm-abhj/pm-iyqf/pm-f583/pm-o5uw. Placeholder audit now clean: generic_blocked_reason=0, generic_unblock_note=0, generic_repro_steps=0, empty_body=0, terminal_missing_close_reason=0, terminal_resolution_placeholder=0, pending_upstream_blocked_by=0.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Phase 6 gap-creation complete: created governance automation lineage epic pm-5rjn with three net-new child features for future improvements discovered during this run: pm-vi2v (governance normalize command with dry-run/apply), pm-dw5s (validate low-signal metadata quality checks), and pm-lwps (batch ownership-override planning/execution mode).

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Phase 7 validation complete: pm validate checks metadata/resolution/command_references/history_drift all pass clean on 482 items after backfilling 10 closed-item resolution gaps (pm-16f4, pm-4moz, pm-9ik7, pm-bi0z, pm-c1bn, pm-elsh, pm-i2pc, pm-lm0j, pm-ormq, pm-z9k7). Duplicate audit confirms exact_duplicate_title_groups=0 and active_near_duplicate_groups=0 across active_count=12. Remaining warning is validate_files_missing_linked_paths:9, already tracked as product issue pm-m9tv.

patch.value:
Execute all six governance phases from the approved overhaul plan and capture validation evidence plus residual follow-ups.

## Governance Quality Rubric (v2026-04-04)

### Per-item mandatory quality bars
- Every item must have specific: description, acceptance_criteria, goal/objective/value/impact/outcome/why_now, and body context that explains current scope and execution state.
- Every item must carry evidence links appropriate to scope: files/tests/docs and at least one substantive comment or note capturing implementation or governance rationale.
- Terminal items (closed/canceled) must include meaningful close_reason and resolution context without generic placeholders.
- Active items (open/in_progress/blocked) must include concrete ownership, blocker linkage, and unblock strategy with explicit PM IDs when blocked.

### Hierarchy and duplicate policy
- Canonical lineage target is Epic -> Feature -> Task/Issue/Chore except when a direct Epic child is explicitly justified in body text.
- parent field and dependency(kind=parent) semantics must align; stale lineage edges are corrected.
- Duplicate clusters resolve to one canonical item; non-canonical siblings are marked superseded/canceled with canonical ID references.

### Standards mapping
- PMBOK 8: value delivery + governance accountability fields (goal/objective/value/impact/outcome) are required.
- ISO 21502: planning/monitoring/closure context captured via acceptance criteria, stakeholder impact, and closure evidence.
- Scrum 2020 commitments: backlog transparency through clear goal + Definition of Ready + Definition of Done evidence trail.
- DORA guidance: where delivery quality applies, tests/verification evidence and failure-recovery context are explicit and reproducible.

### Placeholder elimination rules
- Remove generic boilerplate such as "run-linked-flow-and-compare-to-ac" and replace with item-specific reproducible steps.
- Remove templated closed-status blocker text unless it conveys concrete historical context.
- Empty body values are replaced with concise implementation/governance narrative.

## Final Governance Summary (2026-04-04)

### Taxonomy and lineage model
- Canonical planning lineage: Epic -> Feature -> Task/Issue/Chore.
- Parent graph status: self-parent and invalid parent-type violations are fully eliminated.
- Parent dependency alignment: stale parent dependency edges were reconciled with scalar parent fields.

### Standards mapping
- PMBOK 8: value and accountability context captured through goal/objective/value/impact/outcome/why_now on all items.
- ISO 21502: planning/monitoring/closure quality reinforced via acceptance criteria, reproducible verification, and closure rationale fields.
- Scrum commitments: clearer transparency via Definition of Ready + acceptance outcomes + evidence-linked closure metadata.
- DORA-aligned evidence practice: test/verification traces preserved in linked tests/comments to support delivery quality monitoring.

### Governance quality outcomes
- Full sequential enrichment completed across 482 items currently in tracker scope.
- Placeholder patterns eliminated: generic blocker/unblock/repro text, empty bodies, and missing close reasons are now zero.
- Duplicate quality: exact duplicate titles and active near-duplicate groups both zero after consolidation checks.

### Validation state
- pm validate checks passing: metadata, resolution, command_references, history_drift.
- Residual known warning: validate_files_missing_linked_paths=9 remains tracked as product issue pm-m9tv.

### Ongoing maintenance workflow
- Weekly: run pm context, pm list-open, pm list-in-progress, and review recurring task pm-lou4.
- Monthly: run pm validate --check-metadata --check-resolution --check-command-references --check-history-drift --check-files --scan-mode tracked-all and log outcomes.
- Pre-create guardrail: perform duplicate scans (context/search/list) and record evidence in create-time comments.
- Roadmap for productized governance automation is tracked under epic pm-5rjn and children pm-vi2v, pm-dw5s, pm-lwps.
